name: blockchain-verification
description: MEOK AI Labs — Immutable audit trails and certificate verification with SHA-256 hash chains.

tools.name: mint_certificate
tools.description: Mint a blockchain-backed compliance certificate with SHA-256 hash chain, merkle root, and metadata.

tools.name: verify_certificate
tools.description: Verify a certificate's authenticity by checking hash chain integrity, revocation status, and expiry.

tools.name: audit_trail
tools.description: Get the full audit trail for an organization, optionally filtered by framework, with timeline and stats.

tools.name: integrity_check
tools.description: Run full integrity check on the certificate ledger — validates hash chain, content hashes, and merkle tree.
